chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِرَاءِ وَ الْخُصُومَةِ وَ مُعَادَاةِ الرِّجَالِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 120 – The quarreling, and the disputing, and the animosity to the men

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/139)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/139)
text: قَالَ جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) لِلنَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِيَّاكَ وَ مُلَاحَاةَ الرِّجَالِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Hassan Bin Al Husayn Al Kindy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> said to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>: ‘Beware of disputing the men’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-Hassan ibn al-Husayn al-Kindy from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Jibril (Gabriel) said to the Holy Prophet, ‘Beware of engaging in disputes against men.’”
